display_name: Volkswagen Audi Group — full diagnostic catalog

ecus.name: transmission
ecus.common_name: DSG / Tiptronic TCM (DQ200 / DQ250 / DQ381 / DQ500 / 09P / 0BH / 0D9)

ecus.name: abs
ecus.common_name: ABS / ESP (MK60EC1 / MK100 / MK101 / MK CONTI)

ecus.name: cluster
ecus.common_name: Instrument Cluster (KOMBI — virtual cockpit on MQB / MLB)

ecus.name: front_lighting
ecus.common_name: Front lighting controller (Matrix LED — J667 / J668)

ecus.name: sound_actuator
ecus.common_name: Sound actuator / Soundaktor (R / RS / GTI exhaust)

ecus.name: adas
ecus.common_name: Front camera + radar (Travel Assist / Front Assist)

ecus.name: evcc
ecus.common_name: ID.x / e-Golf / e-tron — AC + DC charge controller

ecus.name: ev_motor
ecus.common_name: ID.x / e-Golf / e-tron — drive motor inverter (front)

ecus.name: ev_battery
ecus.common_name: ID.x / e-Golf / e-tron — HV battery (62 / 77 / 82 / 95 kWh)

ecus.name: steering_column
ecus.common_name: Steering column electronics (J527 — wipers / turn signals / cruise)

ecus.name: seat_driver
ecus.common_name: Driver seat module (J136 — memory + heat + vent)

ecus.name: seat_passenger
ecus.common_name: Front-passenger seat module (J521 — memory + heat + vent)

ecus.name: telematics
ecus.common_name: Telematic control unit (J949 — eCall / We Connect)

ecus.name: premium_amp
ecus.common_name: Premium audio amplifier (J525 — Dynaudio / Harman / B&O)

ecus.name: esp_fluid
ecus.common_name: ESP fluid level / brake fluid sensor (G266 brake)

ecus.name: digital_cockpit
ecus.common_name: Audi virtual cockpit / digital cluster (J285 PRO)

ecus.name: ev_eaxle_rear
ecus.common_name: MEB rear e-axle motor inverter (Audi e-tron / VW ID. AWD)
